page: OVHcloud b2-7 is a general-purpose virtual server hosted on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by two dedicated physical cores of an Intel Core Processor (Haswell, no TSX) running at a clock speed of 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 7.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.5 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled with a 50 GB SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results position this server in the lower tiers of performance. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is rated as weak, falling into the bottom 25% with a score of 1072.92, while the multi-core CPU performance is poor, registering at 2156.87. Memory bandwidth tests show weak throughput, with read-only small block cached operations at 178.89 GB/sec and large block uncached writes at 19.33 GB/sec. Similarly, the Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores of 805.0 and 1426.0 respectively indicate limited computational capacity.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation paired with modest hardware specifications, the server offers a predictable but entry-level resource density. It represents a cost-efficient option for workloads that require dedicated CPU cores without demanding high-performance compute or memory bandwidth. This server is suited for lightweight general-purpose applications, basic static web serving, small Redis cache deployments, and simple development or testing environments.
description: OVHcloud b2-7 is a general-purpose virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features two dedicated Intel Haswell physical cores operating at 2.0 GHz, 7.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 50 GB local SSD. Performance benchmarks indicate that this instance is positioned in the lower tier, with a single-core stress-ng score of 1072.92 and a multi-core score of 2156.87, both falling into the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. Memory bandwidth is also modest, with large block uncached writes reaching 19.33 GB/sec. Given its dedicated core allocation and low resource density, it provides a predictable, cost-efficient environment for workloads that do not require high computational power. This server is suited for lightweight applications, basic static web serving, and small-scale development or testing environments.
og_description: OVHcloud b2-7 is a general-purpose virtual server featuring 2 dedicated Intel Haswell cores, 7 GB of RAM, and a 50 GB local SSD, offering a predictable, budget-friendly environment for light workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server with dedicated dual-core processing and local SSD storage for predictable, lightweight workloads.

7.0 GB of system memory providing 3.5 GB per core
One complimentary public IPv4 address included
Best suited for lightweight web serving, small Redis instances, and development environments
